title: Budget categories and percentages
instruction: Read the Patel family budget and answer the questions.
context: Patel family monthly income: £2,400. Rent: £780 | Food: £380 | Transport: £120 | Utilities (gas, electric, water): £150 | Mobile phones: £60 | Internet: £35 | Childcare: £320 | Clothing: £80 | Entertainment: £75 | Total expenses: £2,000.

questions.question: What does 'utilities' include in this budget?
The family spends £320 on childcare. What does 'childcare' mean?
options: Professional care for children while parents work
questions.answer: Professional care for children while parents work

questions.question: What percentage of income is left after expenses?
What percentage of income is spent on rent? (£780 of £2,400)
Food and transport together cost how much per year?
The family saves all remaining money. After how many months can they save £2,400?
